case_title: MORTAZAVI, ALEXANDER VS SHLOMI, SION SONNY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MORTAZAVI, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT SHLOMI, SION SONNY SHLOMI SION SONY  DBA MASEL PHOTO, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLTF FILED DECL: REQUESTS 1/31 AT 8AM.
CERT. RECEIPT TO JEWEL SHLOMI RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
